allOf.description: TroubleTicketSpecification defines the common attributes and relationships of a set of related trouble tickets, while trouble ticket defines a specific instance that is based on a particular trouble ticket specification.

lifecycleStatus.description: Used to indicate the current lifecycle status of this specification such as inDesign,active,rejected,retired

specCharacteristic.description: List of characteristics that the entity can take

relatedParty.description: Parties who manage or otherwise have an interest in this specification

version.description: The version of the trouble ticket specification, in case it is desired to maintain multiple versions of trouble ticket specifications
